context.author: xbiedro
context.orig: ja im pisałem ogólnie że jak chcą nas za rasizm banować to trzeba będzie kanał poprostu usunąć
context.en: I wrote to them in general that if they want to ban us for racism, they will simply have to delete the channel
context.pt: Escrevi para eles em geral que se quiserem nos banir por racismo, simplesmente terão que deletar o canal
context.label: suspicious

context.author: pentagram
context.pt: O racismo é a nossa característica cultural
